_note: A1 curated presentation/provenance/rights sidecar (optional, additive). retrieve.py merges these per-record presentation dimensions onto matching records by (work, locator). representation_kind / rendering_mode are curator-declared, carried-not-trusted metadata (ADR 0003 ┬Д2): downstream still span-verifies (B2) and presents renderings with a marker (B3/renderer). Absent/unparseable/structurally-invalid -> no curation; a wrong-typed value is dropped at merge (enum-membership is checked in the test suite). Only entries already marked as renderings in the reference prose are curated here; do not infer values.
